title: Trump and Putin Call for a Brief Cease-Fire in Ukraine
summary_full: Previous truces have broken down amid competing accusations of violations, and it is not clear that Ukraine will agree to Moscow’s terms.
summary_public: Previous truces have broken down amid competing accusations of violations, and it is not clear that Ukraine will agree to Moscow’s terms.
